3207720.name: Eat It
3207720.description:
Eat it is a crazy arcade game where you have to eat as much food as possible while facing the different threats that appear throughout your challenge.

4 Different Threats to Deal With

You will have to be quick and agile to eliminate or dodge the incoming threats.

Difficulty Increased Over Time

Survive as long as you can to get the best score possible while the difficulty increase over time.

Randomized elements

Some elements of the game are randomly generated to get a unique challenge every game.
3207720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
